posts.title: New Kraft Paper Bags with Handles — Launching Oct 2026
posts.excerpt: We're introducing a new range of premium kraft paper bags with handles, crafted right here in Bengaluru — ideal for boutiques, bakeries, restaurants, and retail stores that care about sustainable packaging. These bags are 100% recyclable and eco-friendly, with custom printing available so you can add your own brand logo, plus wholesale rates for bulk orders. Launching Oct 2026 from our facility — WhatsApp us for pre-launch bulk enquiries.

posts.title: Castle Packaging website is now live
posts.excerpt: We've launched our new website with an easy way to browse our products, request quotes, and get in touch. We'll post updates here as we add new products and services — check back anytime.

posts.title: Custom printing available on all products
posts.excerpt: Custom printing is now available across our full range — paper bags, covers, cups and tissues. Share your artwork and quantity requirement and we'll get back to you with pricing.
